title: NoBroken (No Broken)
description: NoBroken prevents your tools and armor from breaking permanently. When an item reaches 1 durability, it becomes unusable but remains intact for future repairs. Keep your gear alive longer!
body:
**NoBroken** is a simple yet powerful mod for Minecraft that changes how item durability works.

Instead of your tools, weapons, or armor breaking and disappearing at 1 durability, **NoBroken** disables them:

- The item stays in your inventory.
- It becomes unusable until it is repaired.
- No more accidentally losing your precious equipment!

Perfect for RPG servers, hardcore survival, or any adventure where every item matters.

Works in Multiplayer and Singleplayer.

---

Used in the [Legends Reborn: Medieval](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/legends-reborn-medieval) modpack.
